diff --git a/ipfs_datasets_py/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/modal_registry.py b/ipfs_datasets_py/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/modal_registry.py
index 6aaea1cc..60920615 100644
--- a/ipfs_datasets_py/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/modal_registry.py
+++ b/ipfs_datasets_py/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/modal_registry.py
@@ -158,9 +158,26 @@ DEFAULT_MODAL_PROFILES: Tuple[ModalParseProfile, ...] = (
         family=ModalLogicFamily.TEMPORAL,
         system=ModalSystem.LTL,
         operators=(
-            _op("G", ("always",), ("always", "throughout", "until"), (ModalSystem.LTL, ModalSystem.CTL)),
-            _op("F", ("eventually",), ("eventually", "within", "by"), (ModalSystem.LTL, ModalSystem.CTL)),
-            _op("X", ("next",), ("next", "after", "following"), (ModalSystem.LTL, ModalSystem.CTL)),
+            _op(
+                "G",
+                ("always",),
+                ("always", "throughout", "until", "from time to time", "periodically"),
+                (ModalSystem.LTL, ModalSystem.CTL),
+            ),
+            _op(
+                "F",
+                ("eventually",),
+                (
+                    "eventually",
+                    "within",
+                    "not later than",
+                    "no later than",
+                    "not less often than",
+                    "at least every",
+                ),
+                (ModalSystem.LTL, ModalSystem.CTL),
+            ),
+            _op("X", ("next",), ("next", "after", "following", "thereafter"), (ModalSystem.LTL, ModalSystem.CTL)),
         ),
         semantics=ModalSemanticsSpec(tree_time=True),
         description="Deadlines, effective dates, and temporal scopes.",
diff --git a/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_legal_modal_parser.py b/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_legal_modal_parser.py
index 7fc5af47..f7492979 100644
--- a/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_legal_modal_parser.py
+++ b/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_legal_modal_parser.py
@@ -36,6 +36,29 @@ def test_parser_extracts_deontic_and_temporal_cues() -> None:
     assert {"must", "within"}.issubset(cue_terms)
 
 
+def test_parser_treats_statutory_frequency_phrases_as_temporal() -> None:
+    parser = LegalModalParser()
+
+    cues = parser.extract_cues(
+        "The President shall revise and republish the plan not less often than every 5 years."
+    )
+    families = {cue.family.value for cue in cues}
+    cue_terms = {cue.cue for cue in cues}
+
+    assert {"deontic", "temporal"}.issubset(families)
+    assert "not less often than" in cue_terms
+
+
+def test_parser_does_not_treat_agentive_by_as_temporal_cue() -> None:
+    parser = LegalModalParser()
+
+    cues = parser.extract_cues("A housing voucher is administered by the public housing agency.")
+    families = {cue.family.value for cue in cues}
+
+    assert "frame" in families
+    assert "temporal" not in families
+
+
 def test_parser_compiles_cues_to_modal_ir_with_provenance() -> None:
     parser = LegalModalParser()
 
diff --git a/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_spacy_modal_codec.py b/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_spacy_modal_codec.py
index 66b6e568..ec8ffa58 100644
--- a/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_spacy_modal_codec.py
+++ b/tests/unit/optimizers/logic_theorem_optimizer/test_spacy_modal_codec.py
@@ -57,6 +57,25 @@ def test_spacy_decoder_vector_and_family_logits_are_deterministic() -> None:
     assert logits["deontic"] > logits["temporal"]
 
 
+def test_spacy_encoder_uses_temporal_frequency_phrase_without_agentive_by_noise() -> None:
+    encoder = SpaCyLegalEncoder(model_name="definitely_missing_legal_model")
+    encoding = encoder.encode(
+        (
+            "The President shall revise the plan not less often than every 5 years. "
+            "A housing voucher is administered by the agency."
+        ),
+        document_id="sample-temporal-frequency",
+        source="us_code",
+    )
+
+    temporal_cues = [cue for cue in encoding.cues if cue.family == "temporal"]
+    cue_terms = {cue.cue for cue in temporal_cues}
+
+    assert temporal_cues
+    assert "not less often than" in cue_terms
+    assert "by" not in cue_terms
+
+
 def test_spacy_codec_exposes_text_features_without_sample_ids() -> None:
     codec = SpaCyModalCodec(
         encoder=SpaCyLegalEncoder(model_name="definitely_missing_legal_model"),
